name: Paw Performance Polo-Medium Women Blue
description: Add a touch of charm to your everyday style with this women’s medium-fit polo in a fresh blue shade. Crafted from a soft, breathable cotton-poly blend, it features a delicate embroidered paw print design that celebrates both cat and dog love — subtle, stylish, and full of heart. Size: Medium (Women’s Fit) Color: Blue Material: Lightweight cotton-poly blend Design: Embroidered dual paw print (cat & dog paws) Fit: Flattering women’s cut with capped sleeves and shaped silhouette Care: Machine washable Perfect for pet lovers who want to stay comfy, confident, and connected to what they love most.
shortDescription: Add a touch of charm to your everyday style with this women’s medium-fit polo in a fresh blue shade. Crafted from a soft, breathable cotton-poly blend
